sentences.arabic: كَتَبَتْ نُورٌ رِسَالَةً لِصَدِيقَتِهَا فِي مَدِينَةٍ بَعِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Nur je napisala pismo svojoj prijateljici u dalekom gradu.
sentences.translationEn: Nour wrote a letter to her friend in a distant city.

sentences.translation: Obavijestila ju je o vijestima iz škole, porodice i kvarta.
sentences.translationEn: She told her about news from school, the family, and the neighborhood.

sentences.arabic: رَسَمَتْ لَهَا صُورَةً صَغِيرَةً وَوَضَعَتْهَا مَعَ الرِّسَالَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nacrtala joj je malu sliku i stavila je uz pismo.
sentences.translationEn: She drew her a small picture and put it with the letter.

sentences.translation: Prijateljica je odgovorila dugim i lijepim pismom.
sentences.translationEn: The friend replied with a long and beautiful letter.
